title: Aero Pro 14
name: Aero Pro 14
summary: A lightweight creator laptop with strong battery life and enough GPU power for editing, coding, and everyday AI workflows.
description: Balanced for software engineers and creators who want portability, battery life, and enough performance to move between coding, editing, and travel without carrying a heavy workstation.

title: Vertex Ultra
name: Vertex Ultra
summary: A flagship phone with a high-end camera system, fast performance, and strong battery life for creators and power users.
description: Built for people who care about mobile photography, all-day responsiveness, and flagship-level polish in a device that can handle daily productivity and content capture.

title: Echo Buds Max
name: Echo Buds Max
summary: Premium over-ear headphones with detailed sound, strong ANC, and comfort for work and travel.
description: Designed for focused work, flights, and long listening sessions where noise cancellation, comfort, and battery life matter more than flashy design gimmicks.

title: Pixel Desk 34
name: Pixel Desk 34
summary: A 34-inch ultrawide display built for multitasking, timelines, dashboards, and immersive productivity setups.
description: Strong fit for people who want more horizontal workspace for software engineering, editing, and spreadsheet-heavy work without stepping up to a dual-monitor setup.

title: Halo Lamp Mini
name: Halo Lamp Mini
summary: A minimalist desk lamp with warm-neutral lighting, a compact footprint, and touch controls for clean setups.
description: A simple, aesthetic lighting option for WFH desks and reading nooks where minimal design, low glare, and compact size are more important than smart-home complexity.

title: Nova Watch Sport
name: Nova Watch Sport
summary: A fitness-forward smartwatch with deep health tracking, LTE, and a bright always-on display.
description: Tailored for people who want better recovery and workout tracking without giving up daily notifications, battery life, or a polished smartwatch experience.

title: Orbit Pad 13
name: Orbit Pad 13
summary: A versatile tablet with pen support, a fast display, and strong app performance for notes, media, and sketching.
description: Works well for students, hybrid workers, and creatives who want a lightweight device that can handle note taking, reading, illustration, and travel-friendly media use.

title: Forge Keyboard 75
name: Forge Keyboard 75
summary: A premium mechanical keyboard tuned for software engineers, writers, and creators who want comfort and fast response.
description: Great for desk setups that prioritize typing feel, compact layout efficiency, and the option to switch between a clean wireless setup and a reliable wired one.

title: Luma Cam Air
name: Luma Cam Air
summary: A compact mirrorless camera for travel creators who want strong color, portability, and stabilized video.
description: A compelling option for people who want better image quality than a phone without stepping into a bulky professional camera setup.

title: Stride Pack Pro
name: Stride Pack Pro
summary: A structured everyday backpack with laptop protection, modular storage, and a travel-friendly profile.
description: Best for short work trips and everyday carry where you want laptop safety, quick-access organization, and a silhouette that still looks clean in a work setting.

title: Streetform Runner S1
name: Streetform Runner S1
summary: A premium everyday sneaker with a clean silhouette, soft cushioning, and versatile styling.
description: Made for people who want a sneaker that feels elevated enough for everyday outfits while still being comfortable for walking, commuting, and long city days.

title: Pulse Speaker Mini
name: Pulse Speaker Mini
summary: A compact smart speaker with room-filling sound, Bluetooth fallback, and strong voice assistant integration.
description: A good fit for smaller rooms or shared spaces where size, voice control, and easy streaming matter more than deep audiophile tuning.
